svg.title: MedConsensus A2A Multi-Agent Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing three specialist AI agents debating a diagnosis, with a consensus agent synthesizing the final output, connected via A2A protocol through the Prompt Opinion platform.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the patient case input look like for MedConsensus?')
sendPrompt('What does the MedConsensus orchestrator agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the cardiology specialist agent do in MedConsensus?')
sendPrompt('What does the pulmonology specialist agent do in MedConsensus?')
sendPrompt('What does the general medicine specialist agent do in MedConsensus?')
sendPrompt('How does the debate round work in MedConsensus?')
g.text: Each agent argues top Dx · challenges rivals

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the consensus agent do in MedConsensus?')
sendPrompt('What does the MedConsensus final output report look like?')

rect.style: fill: #1D9E75; fill: #0F6E56; fill: var(--c-teal-600, #0F6E56);fill:rgb(15, 110, 86);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
